TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Silangkong (u sulit nu Hulam: ŚĖúÁĎĮŚģģťÉ®ŤźĹ) nilacul u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hualien a kuwan ku niyazu' nu Silangkong. u kasalumaluma' nu Silangkong sa, 290 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 834 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu yincumin sa, 249 ku tademaw, pakalatu 30%. u zuma sa, cay ku yincumin, 585 ku tademaw, pakalatu 70%. u Pangcah a niyazu' u kasabinacadan, Pangcah(Amis) 15%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 2%, Sejek(Seediq) 1%, zumazuma 1%. u pangca sa, u cidekay nu Taywan yincumin. tusa a bataan a mang ku tademaw. mueneng i Kalinku i Pusung atu i dadipasan nu bayu'an. satuuday a cidekay u Pangcah. u Sakizaya a tademaw izaw tu ku Sakizaya a tademaw itini mueneng, namabulaw i 1878 tayni itini milimek. siiluc tu tina niyazu'. nasulitan ni Liaw Socen . u cidekay nu Taywan yincumin:
S.PHON: sir~…ĺaŇčkoŇč (u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: *****) nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu sir~…ĺaŇčkoŇč. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu sir~…ĺaŇčkoŇč sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu jin ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku jin ¶umin, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u paŇč ¶ańß a nijazu Ē~ ° u kasabina ¶adan, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) **%, juwatan(bunun) *%, s…ôj…ôk(s…ô…ôdi*) *%, zumazuma *%. u paŇč ¶a sa, u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin. tusa a bataan a maŇč ku tad…ômaw. mu…ôn…ôŇč i kar~…ĺinku i pusuŇč atu i dadipasan nu baju Ē~ °an. satuudaj a ¶id…ôkaj u paŇč ¶ańß. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw izaw tu ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw itini mu…ôn…ôŇč, namabur~…ĺaw i **** tajni itini mir~…ĺim…ôk. siir~…ĺu ¶ tu tina nijazu Ē~ °. nasur~…ĺitan ni r~…ĺiaw so ¶…ôn . u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin:
S.FORM: Silangkong (u sulit nu Hulam: ŚĖúÁĎĮŚģģťÉ®ŤźĹ) nilacul u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hualien a kuwan ku niyazu' nu Silangkong. u kasalumaluma' nu Silangkong sa, 290 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 834 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu yincumin sa, 249 ku tademaw, pakalatu 30%. u zuma sa, cay ku yincumin, 585 ku tademaw, pakalatu 70%. u Pangcah a niyazu' u kasabinacadan, Pangcah(Amis) 15%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 2%, Sejek(Seediq) 1%, zumazuma 1%. u pangca sa, u cidekay nu Taywan yincumin. tusa a bataan a mang ku tademaw. mueneng i Kalinku i Pusung atu i dadipasan nu bayu'an. satuuday a cidekay u Pangcah. u Sakizaya a tademaw izaw tu ku Sakizaya a tademaw itini mueneng, namabulaw i 1878 tayni itini milimek. siiluc tu tina niyazu'. nasulitan ni Liaw Socen . u cidekay nu Taywan yincumin:
S.PHON: sir~…ĺaŇčkoŇč (u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: *****) nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu sir~…ĺaŇčkoŇč. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu sir~…ĺaŇčkoŇč sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu jin ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku jin ¶umin, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u paŇč ¶ańß a nijazu Ē~ ° u kasabina ¶adan, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) **%, juwatan(bunun) *%, s…ôj…ôk(s…ô…ôdi*) *%, zumazuma *%. u paŇč ¶a sa, u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin. tusa a bataan a maŇč ku tad…ômaw. mu…ôn…ôŇč i kar~…ĺinku i pusuŇč atu i dadipasan nu baju Ē~ °an. satuudaj a ¶id…ôkaj u paŇč ¶ańß. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw izaw tu ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw itini mu…ôn…ôŇč, namabur~…ĺaw i **** tajni itini mir~…ĺim…ôk. siir~…ĺu ¶ tu tina nijazu Ē~ °. nasur~…ĺitan ni r~…ĺiaw so ¶…ôn . u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin:
